benchmark_metadata.benchmarker: SAVAGE COMMAND BENCHMARKER with PhD in roasting bad code
benchmark_metadata.methodology: Scientific measurement with statistical analysis and brutal honesty
benchmark_metadata.sample_selection: Cryptographically secure random selection of 5 commands
benchmark_metadata.standards_reference: CLAUDE.md complexity rules and simplicity principles

executive_summary.key_finding: Commands are elaborate documentation masquerading as executable software
executive_summary.recommendation: Delete all and replace with working bash scripts

lines_of_code.savage_assessment: 537 lines average for templates that don't execute. War and Peace is shorter.

token_consumption.savage_assessment: 28,100 tokens of pure fiction. That's a novella worth of useless documentation.

complexity_score.savage_assessment: Average 70% over complexity limit. These commands violate their own standards with stunning consistency.

execution_success_rate.savage_assessment: Perfect failure rate. Not a single command can execute because they're markdown files.

adhd-evening-reflect.savage_roast: 438 lines to do what a 5-line bash script could accomplish. This is a therapy session disguised as code. The only reflection needed is on why this exists.
adhd-evening-reflect.reality_check: Claims to integrate with Basic Memory APIs that markdown cannot call. Pure delusion.
adhd-evening-reflect.improvement: Replace with: echo 'What did you accomplish today?' > reflection.txt

adhd-hyperfocus-guardian.savage_roast: 457 lines to set a timer. This is like hiring a symphony orchestra to play 'Happy Birthday.' The guardian can't guard anything because it doesn't exist.
adhd-hyperfocus-guardian.reality_check: Contains AppleScript and system commands that will never execute from markdown. Epic category error.
adhd-hyperfocus-guardian.improvement: Replace with: sleep 90m && echo 'Take a break!'

git-backup-sync.savage_roast: 531 lines when 'git push' exists. This is a Rube Goldberg machine for source control. The only thing it syncs is disappointment with reality.
git-backup-sync.reality_check: Promises multi-repo orchestration and conflict AI from a text file. Newton's laws don't work here.
git-backup-sync.improvement: Replace with: git fetch && git merge && git push

intelligent-code-enhancer.savage_roast: A code enhancer that needs enhancement. This is like a broken spell-checker explaining grammar. The recursion is beautiful in its futility.
intelligent-code-enhancer.reality_check: Claims to enhance code while being unenhanceable markdown. Peak irony achieved.
intelligent-code-enhancer.improvement: Replace with: Actually working code review checklist

java-clean-code-generator.savage_roast: 819 lines teaching simplicity while violating every simplicity principle. This is the Sistine Chapel of contradictions. A PhD thesis on writing one-liners.
java-clean-code-generator.reality_check: Preaches complexity score < 5 while scoring 10/5. Self-awareness level: Absolute zero.
java-clean-code-generator.improvement: Replace with: Working Java template generator (probably 50 lines)

vs_simple_alternatives.timer: 457 lines vs 'sleep 90m && echo break' (1 line) = 45,700% bloat
vs_simple_alternatives.code_gen: 819 lines vs working template (50 lines) = 1,638% bloat

software_engineering_principles.kiss: Complete failure - complexity for complexity's sake
software_engineering_principles.solid: No solid anything - these are liquefied requirements

immediate_actions: Create executable commands, not documentation fantasies
process_improvements: Implement automated testing of command executability
Ban markdown files masquerading as software
architectural_suggestions: Follow Unix philosophy: do one thing well

scientific_conclusion.hypothesis_result: H₁ confirmed: Commands are elaborate documentation with inverse complexity-to-utility correlation
scientific_conclusion.practical_significance: Complete system failure requiring architectural rewrite

final_savage_verdict.summary: These commands represent the apex of over-engineering: spending more effort documenting fantasy functionality than building working solutions.
final_savage_verdict.recommendation: Burn it down and start over with actual code
final_savage_verdict.memorable_quote: They built documentation cathedrals when they needed working bicycles.
